description_long: This is a standard 12 fl oz (355 mL) aluminum can of Diet Coke, featuring a sleek cylindrical shape with a slightly tapered top and bottom. The can is predominantly silver with bold red vertical stripes and the iconic 'Diet Coke' logo in white and red, prominently displayed on the front. The top of the can is metallic with a pull-tab opening mechanism, and the sides include detailed nutritional information and a barcode. The surface is glossy and reflective, typical of beverage cans, and the can appears unopened and intact. The branding and product information are clearly printed, with the logo and product name visible from multiple angles. The can is lightweight, designed for single-use, and is commonly found in urban environments such as vending machines, convenience stores, and public spaces.
description: A silver aluminum can of Diet Coke with red branding, glossy finish, and detailed nutritional labeling. The can is cylindrical, lightweight, and features a pull-tab top.
description_view_0: The can is shown from an angle highlighting the barcode, ingredients, and part of the red Diet Coke stripe.
description_view_1: This view displays the side of the can with two vertical red stripes and a small Diet Coke logo near the bottom.
description_view_2: The front of the can is visible, showcasing the large 'Diet Coke' logo, red stripe, and product details such as volume and calorie count.
description_view_3: The back of the can is shown, featuring the full nutrition facts panel, barcode, and recycling information.
attribute_brand_logo: The 'Diet Coke' logo is visible in white and red on the front and side of the can, with a stylized script and bold font, located vertically along the red stripe.
attribute_flavor_indication: The word 'Diet' and the red and silver color scheme indicate a diet cola flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A detailed nutrition facts panel is visible on the back of the can, listing calories, ingredients, and other nutritional information.
